name: legal-respond
description: Draft templated legal-ops response (DSAR ack, hold notice, clause pushback) — not legal advice

steps.prompt:
Run skill legal-playbook procedure **respond**.
Draft one templated response matching user intent (DSAR acknowledgment, legal hold/preservation notice, or standard RED-clause pushback).
Use placeholders [PARTY] [DATE] [MATTER]. Neutral tone. No admissions. No fake citations.
Mark as draft for counsel edit. Not legal advice.

steps.action: Acknowledge draft must be edited/approved by counsel before send
steps.detail: Do not send external legal communications without human counsel.
